thinking_toggle: chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking (true=on / false=off); reasoning returned in reasoning_content
server_cmdline: llama-server -m /models/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-UD-Q8_K_XL.gguf -ngl 99 -c 524288 --parallel 2 -t 1 -sm layer -ts 1/1 -ctk q8_0 -ctv q8_0 -fa on -b 2048 -ub 512 --defrag-thold 0.1 --jinja --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --metrics -a gemma-4-26b-a4b
max_tokens_policy: per-prompt cap (default 8192 thinking-on / 2048 off; long_context uses each prompt's value); clamped to fit n_ctx=262144
